product_name: Anime Heroes - Naruto - Naruto Uzumaki (Renewal ver.) 6.5" Action Figure

bullets: Multiple pose on package – This renewaled Naruto is super poseable. Posing cuts coming from the series is on front and back side of the package. Beautiful artwork on the front featuring the characters you know and love.
Endless Play - Each figure come with 2 sets of interchangable hands, character specific accessories, and 20+ points of articulation to pose and play in endless ways.
Collect them all - Bandai Namco Toys & Collectibles America has a full line-up of Naruto action figures for you to show off your fandom and collect your favorite characters.
Impressive likeness – Each figure comes with detailed sculpt and true to show features that Anime Heroes action figures are known for.
Impressive Likeness - Each figure comes with detailed sculpt and true to show features that Anime Heroes action figures are known for. For ages 4 and up
content.description: Join your favorite sorcerors of the Tokyo Jujutsu High, from Jujutsu Kaisen, and relive the amazing fight scenes, demon curses and award winning anime that took the world by storm. Anime Heroes Jujutsu Kaisen, by Bandai Namco Toys & Collectibles, brings you the most iconic characters from the show in a 6.5-inch action figure. For ages 4 and up.

attributes.whats_in_box: figure, 2 sets of interchangable hands, character specific accessories

compliance.choking_hazard: Yes - Small Parts; Warning label on product packaging.
